sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n13391" key="a)popemptiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀποπεμπτικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n13391.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">valedictory,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὕμνοι</foreign> Men.Rh.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.336S.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
